base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_mountain — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Mountain — 4 autotile variants for Death Mountain/boundary walls. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mountain — 4 autotile variants for Death Mountain/boundary walls; impassable
